title: Robin Appears on the Merry
description: On pages 0, 1, 2, 3, this part focuses on a new crewmate and a new mystery. Robin settles into the ship while the crew argues, adapts, and begins moving toward the strange next stage of the Grand Line.
scene: This scene belongs to the A New Crewmate and a New Mystery sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Mr. 2 Bon Clay, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: I'm going to become a pirate queen!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What's wrong? You're covered in sweat.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Ah, your highness was here as well?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What did you try to do!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The square is already packed with people.

summary: Robin settles into the ship while the crew argues, adapts, and begins moving toward the strange next stage of the Grand Line.
